codeReview.summary: This fix commit adds meaningful regression coverage for deleted-detail handling and some persistence paths (refresh-style page loads and same-user re-auth checks), but one prior persistence blocker remains: the required concurrent cross-feature corruption scenario is still not verified.

issues.description: The cross-flow persistence suite still does not test VAL-CROSS-039's required concurrent workflow (pantry add -> generate -> convert -> verify recipes and pantry remain intact). The existing "Data Persistence Across Operations" cases only assert list/search rendering with static in-memory inputs.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `fullstack-worker` skill still mandates agent-browser flow verification without a documented fallback path for the known Clerk headless challenge, which continues to produce justified procedure deviations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md Step 7 requires manual agent-browser verification; mission AGENTS.md documents Clerk headless auth challenge; handoff 2026-04-14T11-45-00-431Z records skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false for this reason.

summary: Re-review result: one prior blocker (deleted recipe detail 404 behavior) is now covered, and refresh/sign-in persistence coverage improved; however, required concurrent cross-feature no-corruption verification is still missing, so the feature remains failing.
